seoTitle: Narridy vs Narrung — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Narridy and Narrung. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Narridy and Narrung.
heading: Narridy vs Narrung — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narridy, South Australia and Narrung, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Narrung has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Narridy (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narridy or Narrung safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narridy has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Narrung scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narridy scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Narrung scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narridy or Narrung?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Narrung has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
